positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic lunar fox silhouette sitting within a stylized ring of crystalline flowers and celestial nebulae. The fox should have sharp, elegant lines and ethereal fur texture. Background elements include glowing geometric mandalas and subtle, bioluminescent constellations forming an arching backdrop. Deep indigo, cosmic teal, and radiant gold are the primary colors, providing strong contrast against the black foreground silhouette. Vector art style, high contrast, perfect for apparel print, central composition, clean lines, solid fill areas.
